name: VT Enrich Domain
description: Extract the domain from alert STIX, scan it on VirusTotal for metadata and detection score. Posts category info, score, malicious vendors, and auto-validates the alert.

cases.left: {% if node.4['Webutation domain info'] is defined %}true1{% endif %}
cases.name: Webutation is defined

arguments.author: Domain enrich by VT
arguments.content:
Safety score given by Virus total: {{ node.4['Webutation domain info']['Safety score'] }}/100 with {% if node.4['Webutation domain info']['Adult content'] == "no" %} {{ node.4['Webutation domain info']['Adult content'] }} {% endif %} adult content detected. Virus total verdict: {{ node.4['Webutation domain info'].Verdict }}.
   
   {%if node.4['Forcepoint ThreatSeeker category'] is defined %}* Forcepoint classified it as '{{ node.4['Forcepoint ThreatSeeker category'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['Dr.Web category'] is defined %}* Dr.Web classified it as '{{ node.4['Dr.Web category'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['sophos category'] is defined %}* Sophos classified it as '{{ node.4['sophos category'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['Webroot category'] is defined %}* Webroot classified it as '{{ node.4['Webroot category'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['Opera domain info'] is defined %}* Opera classified it as '{{ node.4['Opera domain info'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['Comodo Valkyrie Verdict category'] is defined %}* Valkyrie classified it as '{{ node.4['Comodo Valkyrie Verdict category'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['BitDefender category'] is defined %}* BitDefender classified it as '{{ node.4['BitDefender category'] }}'
   {% endif %}{%if node.4['alphaMountain.ai category'] is defined %}* AlphaMountain.ai classified it as '{{ node.4['alphaMountain.ai category'] }}'
   {% endif %}

arguments.author: Playbook Enrich domain with VT
arguments.content: {{ node.7.positives }}/{{ node.7.total }} security vendors flagged the target domain ({{ node.3['output'][0] }}) the {{ node.7.scan_date }} as malicious. [Direct link to VirusTotal]({{ node.7.permalink }})

cases.left: {%if node.4['Forcepoint ThreatSeeker category'] is defined or node.4['Dr.Web category'] is defined or node.4['sophos category'] is defined or node.4['Webroot category'] is defined or node.4['Opera domain info'] is defined or node.4['Comodo Valkyrie Verdict category'] is defined or node.4['BitDefender category'] is defined or node.4['alphaMountain.ai category'] is defined %}true1{% endif %}
cases.name: Yes
